title: Public Showers/Baths * Homeless Families - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Basic Needs > Public Showers/Baths * Homeless Families 3 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Homeless Families Homeless Men Homeless Women Homeless Youth Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES OF LANE COUNTY CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES SPRINGFIELD OASIS DROP-IN DAY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A collaborative project that provides homeless families priority access to a coordinated set of services offered at multiple locations in the G Street neighborhood. The participating organizations function as a campus, with all services within easy walking distance. Services include: -A safe place to be during the day -Access to laundry, showers, and restroom facilities -A place to prepare and eat simple meals -Help finding affordable housing and employment -Access to additional school and community based resources 1025 G Street Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Households experiencing homelessness and at least one child age 17 and younger in their care Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 8am-4pm, Wednesday 8am-6pm, closed holidays Email (541) 345-3628 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF LANE COUNTY FIRST PLACE FAMILY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a day center with laundry, showers, internet access, mail services, clothing vouchers, on-site clothing, and hygiene supplies. Assistance in obtaining identification documents. 4060 W Amazon Drive Eugene, OR 97405 Eligibility: Families with children under age 18 and pregnant women (proof of pregnancy required) who are experiencing homelessness Hours: 7 days per week 9am-5pm (541) 342-7728 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UNION GOSPEL MISSION OF SALEM MEN'S MISSION SHOWER FACILITIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers shower facilities. 777 Commercial Street NE Salem, OR 973010431 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older and minors accompanied by a parent or guardian who are experiencing homelessness. Service animals accepted. Hours: 7 days per week 9am-4:30pm Email (503) 362-3983 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES OF LANE COUNTY OASIS DROP-IN DAY CENTER ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF LANE COUNTY FIRST PLACE FAMILY CENTER UNION GOSPEL MISSION OF SALEM SHOWER FACILITIES
